top_signals.title: Emerging Market Stocks Fall on Korea Selloff; Currencies Weaken
top_signals.summary: A selloff in South Korea’s technology giants dragged the gauge of emerging-market equities down, while most developing-nations’ currencies weakened as global risk sentiment worsened.

top_signals.title: ABL Expands Asset Integrity Services in Brazil
top_signals.summary: Energy and marine consultancy ABL has opened a new office in Salvador, Brazil, expanding its presence in the country and strengthening its asset integrity management offering for the oil and gas, maritime and industrial sectors.The new office…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: THORChain resumes trading five weeks after $10.7 million exploit
top_signals.summary: THORChain resumed trading after a 5-week halt following a $10.7 million multichain exploit in May affecting an Asgard vault.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
